title: Burleigh Heads Rockpools
summary: Great little rockpools to explore at low tide.
why_we_like_it: It's free scenic and kids love finding crabs.
good_to_know: Check the tide times before you go.
parent_tip: Grab a coffee from the kiosk first.

title: South Bank Parklands
summary: Huge parklands with multiple playgrounds and a massive man-made beach.

title: Broadwater Parklands
summary: Massive park with a monorail jumping pillow and water play area.
